mapper.insert: insert into lineups (fixture_id, team_id, formation, coach, created_at) values (#{fixtureId}, #{teamId}, #{formation}, #{coach}, now())

INSERT INTO lineups (fixture_id, team_id, formation, coach, created_at)
VALUES
( #{item.fixtureId}, #{item.teamId}, #{item.formation}, #{item.coach}, #{item.createdAt} )
